title: The Ark Maxim Starts Moving
description: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: We're gonna go splat on the ground!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: There's not a single place on Skypica...

dialogue.text: I have been looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Curse those pirates of the Blue Seas...!
